title: Verify MainActivity onCreate initializes components correctly
test_steps: ["Launch the application", "Check if the activity is created successfully", "Verify that the binding object is initialized", "Verify that the content view is set to the root of the binding layout", "Verify that the screen orientation is kept on", "Find the BottomNavigationView by its ID", "Verify that the AppBarConfiguration is built with the correct navigation IDs", "Find the NavController by its ID", "Verify that the NavController is set up with the ActionBar and the BottomNavigationView"]
expected_result: ["The MainActivity is created without errors", "The binding object is not null", "The content view is set to the root of the binding layout", "The screen orientation is kept on", "The BottomNavigationView is found and initialized", "The AppBarConfiguration is built with the correct navigation IDs", "The NavController is found and initialized", "The NavController is set up with the ActionBar and the BottomNavigationView"]
